MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN MERCHANDISE MART, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIPDBA SAN FRANCISCO MART COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-15-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FANTASY BED MANUFACTURING CO.,INC., A CALIF CORP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 875 STEVENSON ST, FLOOR 10, SPACES 1019 & 1020, S.F, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, PL. & DEF. EACH RESERVE THEIR LEGAL RIGHTS IN REGARDS RO ANY SUBSEQUENT ACTION OTHER THAN JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION.
